canonical_lifecycle_note: V1 local-deterministic model. External runtime lifecycle (/session → /continuity → /authority → /compile) is SEQUENCED for post-V1. governed_files_hash provides repo-verifiable content binding. Owner workflow_dispatch provides explicit authorization.
intent: Authorize Policy-Bound GMA (Standing Authority) bootstrap implementation.  This governance mutation introduces Standing Authority issuance and check-time derivation as a third admission path while preserving existing GMA tiers, fail-closed behavior, bounded authority, and proof-bound governance mutation lineage.
